modules.html_content:
The Happy Couple

A happy marriage is the union of two good forgivers.

Jane Milea

I kind of have a thing for Him

I am just crazy about Dilan. He has a truly amazing heart. I am so incredibly blessed and excited to spend everyday for the rest of my life with my best friend.

John Dilan

I kind of have a thing for Her

Milea means so much to me and I can’t believe she is actually going to marry me. I’m so excited to spend the rest of my life with her. Milea is perfect for me.

modules.html_content:

Our Special Story

A meaningful moment shared with the people we love.

A moment worth remembering

Use this section to share a short story, a favorite memory, or the reason this celebration is so meaningful.

This module can adapt to weddings, quinceañeras, birthdays, baby showers, graduations, anniversaries, family gatherings, and other special events.

modules.html_content:
Dress Code

What to Wear

Please dress in a way that feels comfortable, polished, and appropriate for the celebration.

Suggested attire: semi-formal, cocktail, themed, or event-appropriate clothing based on the style of the celebration.

Guests are welcome to use the event colors as inspiration. Comfortable shoes are recommended if the celebration includes dancing, outdoor areas, or extended standing time.

“Come ready to celebrate, feel your best, and enjoy every moment.”

Gift Details

Gifts Are Optional

Your presence is already a meaningful gift. Please do not feel obligated to bring anything beyond your love, support, and good wishes.

If you would still like to honor the celebration with a gift, a registry, contribution link, wishing well, or gift table may be available for guests.

“The greatest gift is celebrating this moment together.”

View Registry Gift Note

modules.style_name: Wireframe universal para mostrar uno o dos festejados,
modules.description: Wireframe universal para mostrar uno o dos festejados, o para funcionar como cronograma visual de fotos tipo antes y ahora, sin redes sociales.
modules.tags: ["festejado","festejados","celebrated people","timeline","before and now","quinceanera","boda","cumpleanos","graduacion","baby shower","aniversario","evento","2 cards","1 card","photo story","responsive"]
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe universal para mostrar uno o dos festejados, o para funcionar como cronograma visual de fotos tipo antes y ahora, sin redes sociales."
modules.html_content:
Featured People

Celebrated Moments

This section can introduce one celebrated person, two celebrated people, or a visual timeline showing a meaningful before-and-now story.

Festejado · Festejados · Antes y Ahora

Festejada

Name One

Use this card to present the celebrated person, share a short story, or describe a meaningful stage of the event. This can be used for the main honoree or for a “before” photo in a timeline.

Example uses: quinceañera de pequeña, birthday memory, childhood portrait, first chapter, or honored guest profile.

Actual / Companion / Second Honoree

Name Two

The second card can introduce another celebrated person, the couple, a family member, or the “now” stage of the same person to create a visual timeline across the celebration.

Example uses: current quince portrait, groom/bride counterpart, graduate today, present-day birthday portrait, or second honoree.

modules.style_name: Wireframe universal de organización del evento con cuatro
modules.description: Wireframe universal de organización del evento con cuatro momentos alrededor de una imagen central fija, sin slider.
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe universal de organización del evento con cuatro momentos alrededor de una imagen central fija, sin slider."
modules.html_content:
Event Menu

Event Organization

A simple guide to the moments, activities, and details planned for the celebration.

01

First Moment

Use this space to describe the first important activity, meal, ceremony, entrance, welcome, or scheduled part of the celebration.

02

Second Moment

This can describe dinner, cake cutting, games, speeches, dances, photo sessions, or any important event detail.

03

Third Moment

Use this area for the main ceremony, presentation, toast, activity, performance, or meaningful highlight.

04

Final Moment

This can describe music, dancing, farewell, closing activity, dessert, photos, or the final part of the celebration.

modules.tags: ["personas importantes","corte de honor","familiares","padrinos","damas","chambelanes","amigos","best friends","grupo","honor court","evento","modulo universal","boda","quinceanera","cumpleanos","baby shower","graduacion","despedida","aniversario","sin redes sociales","responsive"]
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe universal para presentar grupos importantes del evento, como corte de honor, familiares, padrinos, damas, chambelanes o amigos cercanos, sin redes sociales."
modules.html_content:
Thanks for Being There

Our Special People

A space to honor the people who are part of this celebration, from family and close friends to the court of honor or event party.

Group One

  • Name One
  • Name Two
  • Name Three
  • Name Four
  • Name Five

Use this card to introduce one group of important people, such as damas, chambelanes, bridesmaids, family members, padrinos, friends, cousins, siblings, or special guests.

Thank you for being part of this moment.

Group Two

  • Name One
  • Name Two
  • Name Three
  • Name Four
  • Name Five

Use this card for a second group, such as relatives, best friends, escorts, padrinos, godparents, classmates, teammates, or people who play a meaningful role in the event.

Your presence makes this celebration more meaningful.

Gift Table

Gift Options

Your presence is already the most meaningful gift. If you would like to share something extra, here are a few gift options available online.

G

Amazon

View the registry or selected gift ideas through our Amazon list.

Visit Store

Visit Store

Find practical gifts, household items, baby gifts, or celebration items.

Visit Store
G

Thank you for your love, support, and generosity. Celebrating together is what matters most.

modules.style_name: Wireframe universal de dress code con dos tarjetas
modules.description: Wireframe universal de dress code con dos tarjetas para hombres y mujeres, incluyendo colores permitidos, colores a evitar y recomendaciones de vestimenta.
modules.tags: ["vestimenta","dress code","men","women","colors allowed","colors to avoid","guest details","evento","modulo universal","boda","quinceanera","cumpleanos","baby shower","graduacion","despedida","aniversario","dos tarjetas","responsive"]
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe universal de dress code con dos tarjetas para hombres y mujeres, incluyendo colores permitidos, colores a evitar y recomendaciones de vestimenta."
modules.html_content:
Dress Code

What to Wear

Please use this guide to choose an outfit that feels elegant, comfortable, and aligned with the celebration.

M

For Men

Suits, dress shirts, slacks, jackets, or polished semi-formal attire are recommended.

Colors You Can Wear

  • Black
  • Navy
  • Gray
  • Beige

Colors to Avoid

  • White
  • Ivory
  • Bright Red
  • Neon
  • A jacket or dress shirt is recommended for formal events.
  • Please avoid overly casual clothing unless the event theme allows it.
  • Comfortable dress shoes are recommended.
W

For Women

Dresses, jumpsuits, skirts, elegant separates, or polished semi-formal attire are recommended.

Colors You Can Wear

  • Sage
  • Champagne
  • Dusty Blue
  • Mauve

Colors to Avoid

  • White
  • Ivory
  • Bright Red
  • Neon
  • Please avoid wearing colors reserved for the main honoree or host.
  • Comfortable shoes are recommended if the event includes dancing.
  • Accessories may follow the event palette or theme.

Colors and attire can be adjusted by event type, theme, cultural tradition, or family preference.

modules.html_content:
Our Portrait

A love story framed in roses and gold.

Add a favorite photo of the couple inside a romantic western portrait frame inspired by antique parchment, ivory roses, deep red florals, and refined gold details.

This section is designed as a keepsake moment before guests continue into the celebration details.

modules.style_name: Wireframe de sección formal donde las familias presentan
modules.description: Wireframe de sección formal donde las familias presentan la invitación con monograma, encabezado editorial y texto de bienvenida.
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe de sección formal donde las familias presentan la invitación con monograma, encabezado editorial y texto de bienvenida."
modules.html_content:
W

Together With Their Families

Hosted with love and western grace.

Mr. and Mrs. Rivera joyfully invite you to celebrate the marriage of their daughter.

Mr. and Mrs. Hayes warmly welcome family and friends to honor this union and the beginning of a shared life.

With grateful hearts, both families invite you to a romantic western wedding celebration filled with love, music, dinner, and dancing.

modules.style_name: Wireframe de ubicaciones para ceremonia, mapa e indicaciones
modules.description: Wireframe de ubicaciones para ceremonia, mapa e indicaciones de recepción con tarjetas flotantes sobre fondo visual decorativo.
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe de ubicaciones para ceremonia, mapa e indicaciones de recepción con tarjetas flotantes sobre fondo visual decorativo."
modules.html_content:
Ceremony, map, and reception.

Follow the roses, the golden details, and the western trail to each part of the celebration.

C

Ceremony

Rosewood Ranch Garden

Mesa, Arizona

The ceremony begins at 4:30 PM beneath the evening light.

M

Map

Guest parking will be available near the main ranch entrance. Please follow the floral signs toward the ceremony lawn.

R

Reception

The reception follows at 6:00 PM inside the Grand Barn Hall with dinner, music, and dancing.

modules.style_name: Wireframe de itinerario para boda western con encabezado
modules.description: Wireframe de itinerario para boda western con encabezado editorial, línea divisoria, agenda de eventos y tarjetas con hora, título y descripción.
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe de itinerario para boda western con encabezado editorial, línea divisoria, agenda de eventos y tarjetas con hora, título y descripción."
modules.html_content:
The Evening Trail

A celebration unfolding like parchment.

From vows at golden hour to the final dance under warm western lights, each moment has been planned with love.

  1. 4:00

    Guest Arrival

    Arrive at the ranch garden, sign the guest book, and enjoy the floral western setting.

  2. 4:30

    Ceremony

    The couple exchanges vows surrounded by roses, warm parchment tones, and family blessings.

  3. 6:00

    Dinner Reception

    Guests gather for dinner, heartfelt speeches, and the couple’s first dance.

  4. 8:30

    Dancing

    The evening continues with music, dessert, and a final toast to forever.

modules.description: Wireframe de detalles para invitados con encabezado editorial y dos tarjetas para código de vestimenta y regalos.
modules.descripcion_larga: "Wireframe de detalles para invitados con encabezado editorial y dos tarjetas para código de vestimenta y regalos."
modules.html_content:
Guest Details

A few notes before the celebration.

Please review the dress code and gift details so you can enjoy the evening comfortably.

Dress Code

Western Formal

Elegant western attire is encouraged. Deep reds, ivory, champagne, warm browns, boots, hats, and gold accents are welcome.

Gifts

Your presence is our greatest gift.

If you wish to honor us with a gift, a registry and wishing well will be available for guests.
